ICST 2025

View of the City of Naples from the Certosa di San Martino

Photo by Kelly from Pexels

ICST 2025

Aerial view of the City of Naples

Photo by Vincenzo De Simone from Unsplash

ICST 2025

Castel dell’Ovo, Naples, Italy

18th IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation (ICST) 2025

Naples, Italy, 2025


Welcome to the official website of the 18th IEEE International Conference on Software Testing, Verification and Validation (ICST), 2025 edition.

ICST serves as a premier platform uniting researchers, scientists, engineers, and practitioners worldwide to showcase their cutting-edge research findings, innovative ideas, and practical applications in the domain of Software Testing, Verification, and Validation. The 18th edition of ICST, scheduled for 2025, will be held in Naples, Italy.

ICST 2025 will welcome high-quality submissions across various tracks, including (but not limited to) full research papers, short papers, posters, testing tools and demonstrations, industry perspectives, and doctoral symposium submissions. Additionally, the conference will host co-located events, including workshops, challenges and tutorials, and keynote addresses by eminent scientists. Stay tuned for additional details on tracks and co-located events!

All submissions will be rigorously peer-reviewed to ensure quality, originality, and relevance. Accepted papers will be submitted for inclusion into IEEE Xplore subject to meeting IEEE Xplore’s scope and quality requirements.

We are currently working on defining the last details and populating this website with pertinent information. Check back soon for updates and details!

Latest News

  • Thu 3 Apr 2025 by Luigi Libero Lucio Starace

    ICST 2025: Meet the Organizing Committee Behind the Conference!

    Naples, Italy – As ICST 2025 continues in Naples, we are pleased to share a photo of the Organizing Committee, whose efforts have been essential in planning this event.

    The committee has coordinated logistics, developed the program, and facilitated discussions among attendees. Their work has contributed to the smooth operation of the conference, ensuring every detail runs smoothly.

    W …

    read full article
  • Wed 26 Mar 2025 by Luigi Libero Lucio Starace

    Register Now for the Hands-On Scenario-Based Testing Training with BeamNG.tech

    The Hands-On Training on Scenario-based Testing with BeamNG.tech, organized by BeamNG GmbH and the Austrian Institute of Technology, will take place within ICST 2025 on Friday 4, 11:00 -12:30. The event will be a great chance for attendees to try out the latest and greatest in driving simulation and testing.

    Everybody is welcome to join the hands-on training; ho …

    read full article
All News Articles

Social Media Links

ICST 2025 now has official profiles on X.com (@ICSTconf) and LinkedIn. Follow us to stay informed with real-time updates, announcements, and key insights throughout the event.

Organizing partners

With the patronage of

ICST 2025 acknowledges the patronage of the Municipality of Naples, Italy. Moreover, ICST 2025 was supported by the University of Bern, the University of Naples Federico II, which provided our Venue, and the Department of Electrical Engineering and Information Technology at the University of Naples Federico II.
